title: Remove Yakusoku
description: The song "Yakusoku" by Kumi Tanioka will no longer play ingame or on the title screen.
body:
# Remove Yakusoku
Put simply, I dislike the song "Yakusoku" by Kumi Tanioka. My biggest complaint is the massive "beat drop" halfway through that feels too chaotic to be a calm ambient track. I also tried using another resource pack to remove the other kumi songs, but they're fine in my opinion.\
This resource pack Simply removes Yakusoku. That's it.
